title: Refactor to microservices architecture
original_text: Refactored monolithic application to microservices architecture. Split application into user service, order service, and product service. Implemented API gateway for routing. Added service discovery with Consul. Implemented inter-service communication with gRPC. Added distributed tracing with Jaeger. Implemented centralized configuration. Added tests for microservices. Result: 78 tests pass.
expected_body_lines: - Split application into user, order, product services
- Add distributed tracing and centralized config
expected_command: git commit -m "refactor(arch): migrate to microservices architecture"
